yoga.name: Vishkambha
yoga.meaning: Mixed yoga; hidden risks but strong crisis-solving ability, supportive of durable foundations

yoga.name: Priti
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; love, affection, harmony and good relationships

yoga.name: Ayushman
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; longevity, vitality, health and endurance

yoga.name: Saubhagya
yoga.meaning: Highly auspicious; good fortune, prosperity and marital happiness

yoga.name: Shobhana
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; beauty, charm, grace and artistic appeal

yoga.name: Atiganda
yoga.meaning: Inauspicious; obstacles and dangers, best avoided for new ventures

yoga.name: Sukarma
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; good deeds, ethical action and righteous work

yoga.name: Dhriti
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; patience, stability, steadiness and wise decisions

yoga.name: Shula
yoga.meaning: Inauspicious; conflict, pain and struggle, though it fosters courage

yoga.name: Ganda
yoga.meaning: Inauspicious; risk, danger and knots that require caution

yoga.name: Vriddhi
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; growth, increase, expansion and progress

yoga.name: Dhruva
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; firmness, permanence, stability and determination

yoga.name: Vyaghata
yoga.meaning: Inauspicious; hindrances and collisions, promotes problem-solving

yoga.name: Harshana
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; joy, cheerfulness and delight

yoga.name: Vajra
yoga.meaning: Mixed; thunderbolt strength and unbreakable will, but harsh energy

yoga.name: Siddhi
yoga.meaning: Highly auspicious; success, achievement and fulfilment of goals

yoga.name: Vyatipata
yoga.meaning: Highly inauspicious; calamity and reversal, avoided for all good work

yoga.name: Variyana
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; comfort, excellence, honour and ease

yoga.name: Parigha
yoga.meaning: Inauspicious; obstruction and barriers, develops perseverance

yoga.name: Shiva
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; spiritual upliftment, benevolence and compassion

yoga.name: Siddha
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; accomplishment, perfection and mastery

yoga.name: Sadhya
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; attainment through effort and dedication

yoga.name: Shubha
yoga.meaning: Highly auspicious; auspiciousness, prosperity and harmony

yoga.name: Shukla
yoga.meaning: Auspicious; purity, brightness and positive clarity

yoga.name: Brahma
yoga.meaning: Highly auspicious; creativity, intellect and divine wisdom

yoga.name: Indra
yoga.meaning: Highly auspicious; power, leadership and authority

yoga.name: Vaidhriti
yoga.meaning: Inauspicious; division and imbalance, avoided for important undertakings

karana.name: Bawa
karana.meaning: Movable karana; symbolised by the lion, favourable for auspicious and permanent works

karana.name: Balava
karana.meaning: Movable karana; symbolised by the tiger, good for religious and Brahminical acts

karana.name: Kaulava
karana.meaning: Movable karana; symbolised by the boar, favourable for friendship and relationships

karana.name: Taitila
karana.meaning: Movable karana; symbolised by the donkey, good for trade and royal favour

karana.name: Garija
karana.meaning: Movable karana; symbolised by the elephant, favourable for farming and building

karana.name: Vanija
karana.meaning: Movable karana; symbolised by the cow, auspicious for commerce and trade

karana.name: Vishti
karana.meaning: Movable karana (Bhadra); symbolised by the dog, inauspicious and best avoided for good works

karana.name: Shakuni
karana.meaning: Fixed karana; symbolised by the bird of prey, suited to medicine and mantra work

karana.name: Chatushpada
karana.meaning: Fixed karana; symbolised by the quadruped, suited to rites for ancestors and cattle

karana.name: Naga
karana.meaning: Fixed karana; symbolised by the serpent, inauspicious, harsh and cruel in nature

karana.name: Kimstughna
karana.meaning: Fixed karana; symbolised by the worm, auspicious for beginnings and pious acts

Sun.beej: Om Hraam Hreem Hraum Sah Suryaya Namah

Moon.beej: Om Shraam Shreem Shraum Sah Chandraya Namah

Mars.beej: Om Kraam Kreem Kraum Sah Bhaumaya Namah

Mercury.beej: Om Braam Breem Braum Sah Budhaya Namah

Jupiter.beej: Om Graam Greem Graum Sah Gurave Namah

Venus.beej: Om Draam Dreem Draum Sah Shukraya Namah

Saturn.beej: Om Praam Preem Praum Sah Shanaischaraya Namah

Rahu.beej: Om Bhraam Bhreem Bhraum Sah Rahave Namah

Ketu.beej: Om Sraam Sreem Sraum Sah Ketave Namah
